page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: PHIL209J or PHIL203.

Formerly: PHIL209J.

PHIL204 Happiness (3 Credits)

What does the discipline of philosophy teach us about happiness? This course explores how philosophers have addressed questions about the nature of happiness and its role in the good human life. Questions to

be addressed include: what is it to be happy? What social, economic, and political institutions foster and support human happiness? Can an immoral person be happy? And is a happy life the same as a meaningful life?

Credit Only Granted for. PHIL209E or PHIL204.
